# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

build_job:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running custom build script from repository"
    - if [ -f ./build.sh ]; then chmod +x ./build.sh && ./build.sh; else echo "No build.sh found, using default build"; fi
    - if [ -f ./custom-build.sh ]; then chmod +x ./custom-build.sh && ./custom-build.sh; else echo "No custom-build.sh found"; fi
    - if [ -f ./scripts/build.sh ]; then chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh && ./scripts/build.sh; else echo "No scripts/build.sh found"; fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature/.*
    - /^release/.*
  except:
    - tags
